definition: A four-stage cross-asset pattern (breadth deterioration, secondary beneficiary peaking, curve signal, credit widening) where equity leads credit by 6-12 months with 83% historical hit rate. Currently active in AI-disrupted sectors: legacy media equity down 25-30% while IG spreads at 120-180bp vs historical distressed 300-500bp.
evidence: 5/6 episodes where negative equity-credit basis exceeded 2-sigma, equity was correct forward signal
Legacy media equity down 25-30% from peaks while IG spreads remain 120-180bp
Breadth deterioration signal (equal-weighted underperformance 800-1200bp) already active, matching 1998 timing
Credit widening should accelerate by H2 2026-H1 2027 if historical 6-12 month lead holds
open_questions: Whether current divergence will follow historical sequencing or resolve differently
Which specific AI-disrupted sectors show the widest equity-credit basis
Whether passive credit indexation distorts the Stage 4 signal
